title: Digital creative agency looking for a Agency expert to help us switch out team to Monday.com
excerpt:
We are a digital marketing and creative agency with about 20 people. We are moving systems from WorkFlow Max over to monday.com and are looking for a Monday.com expert that specialises in creative agencies. 
We are looki…

posts.author: SamanthaKeating (Samantha Keating)
posts.cookedHtml:
We are a digital marketing and creative agency with about 20 people. We are moving systems from WorkFlow Max over to monday.com and are looking for a Monday.com expert that specialises in creative agencies.

We are looking for help in the following:
Templates for boards for our various project types (brand, website, social media etc.)
How to integrate time tracking
Merging our current info from WFM to monday.com

We are looking for a partner that has worked with design agencies of our size and are looking to begin implementation in the next month.

posts.author: CarbonJon (Jon)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Samantha!

Welcome to the Community! I’m sure everyone is excited to see another party join the monday.com platform, and you’ll soon see how active and helpful this community can be.

I am with CarbonWeb - a Certified Partner of monday.com - and we would love to take a look at this for you. We have helped many new users migrate over the the platform, and we even have Onboarding assistance available to ensure a smooth transition for you and your entire team. We would love to meet for a free consultation to explore this together!

Find a time that works best for you here

Any other questions please feel free to message me on here or shoot me an email.

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @SamanthaKeating ,

Welcome to the monday community !

I am sure our team at thespelas.com can help you out! At thespelas.com we’re an Official and Authorized monday partner with over 6 years of individual experience on the platform and extensive experience in designing and implementing customized solutions that are tailored to each business’ goals.

We have a wealth of experience in assisting marketing/creative agencies with handling all of their processes, from start to finish, no matter how complicated.

We have implemented many a similar workflows in the past, and can certainly assist with templatizing your processes, help you effectively time-track, transfer all your info into monday and also integrate with any other platforms you might use.

We strive to maintain excellent relationships with all businesses we help, and we are sure to be there for you every step of the way.

Please do schedule a Free Consulting Session with us here so we can better discuss your vision and requirements! Alternatively, if none of the available time slots work out for you, please contact us at info@thespelas.com so we can do our best to accommodate you.

I sincerely hope our services can be of use to you!

Best Regards,
Giannis Koukounas, Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com

posts.author: DamcoSolutions ( Neelam Bhatt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Samantha!

To make your creative agency’s workflows come to life, creating boards on monday .com is the right choice. You can create separate boards for each project type, brand, website, social media, and others. Similarly, you can integrate a time-tracking column with any board. They can provide status updates related to projects, measure productivity, and keep track of your employee’s working hours for payroll. Moreover, adding a time tracker column is helpful in terms of resource management. By using appropriate APIs APIs, you can securely merge, connect, and access your information present in the WorkFlow Max tool.

If you’re looking to reduce the hassles of merging WorkFlow Max and integrate time tracking columns in your board, hiring experienced monday.com consultants Is the right choice. Through strategic execution, they can optimize your digital agency’s workflow and productivity.

Regards
Neelam B
Damco Solutions
Phone: +1 609 632 0350 | Email : info@damcogroup.com

posts.cookedHtml: Hi Samantha, I recommend reaching out to HikeMyTraffic® a certified Mondaycom partner with experience in creative agencies. They can help with templates, time tracking, and data migration from WFM.
